channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Seahawks QB Geno Smith exits with knee injury against Green Bay and will undergo testing
item.description: SEATTLE (AP) — An awkward hit ended quarterback Geno Smith’s night and may have done serious damage to the Seahawks’ playoff chances. Smith left Seattle’s 30-13 loss to Green Bay on Sunday night with a right knee injury and was replaced by Sam Howell midway through the third quarter.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS TALBOTT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Mavericks, Warriors combine for NBA-record 48 3-pointers in Dallas' 143-133 victory
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The Dallas Mavericks and Golden State Warriors combined for an NBA-record 48 3-pointers Sunday night. Golden State hit 27 and Dallas made 21 in the Mavericks' 143-133 victory at Chase Center.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: LeBron James returns in Lakers' victory over Grizzlies after 2-game absence
item.description: LeBron James returned to the Los Angeles Lakers on Sunday night in a 116-10 victory over the Memphis Grizzlies after a two-game break.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Mayfield throws for 4 TDs, including 2 to Evans, as Bucs dominate second half to rout Chargers 40-17
item.description: Baker Mayfield threw for 288 yards and four touchdown passes, Mike Evans had a season-high 159 receiving yards and two scores and the Tampa Bay Buccaneers dominated the second half en route to a 40-17 victory over the Los Angeles Chargers on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Kevin Owens hits Cody Rhodes with piledriver, Chelsea Green makes history at Saturday Night's Main Event
item.description: Cody Rhodes retained the Undisputed WWE Championship over Kevin Owens but Owens got the last word. Chelsea Green also made history at the premium live event.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Point guard Dennis Schroder traded by Brooklyn to Golden State
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Golden State has landed point guard Dennis Schroder in a trade with the Brooklyn Nets in exchange for injured guard De'Anthony Melton and guard Reece Beekman, the teams announced Sunday. The trade was agreed to on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Blake Horvath shines as Navy dominates in a 31-13 victory over Bryson Daily and No. 19 Army
item.description: LANDOVER, Md. (AP) — This was an Army-Navy game unlike any before it. The teams had combined for 19 victories this season before their annual clash, a record for the rivalry. Of course, only one of them would be responsible for No. 20 — the biggest win of them all. “I think they're like us.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump gets warm welcome as he watches Army-Navy game alongside key allies, nominees and Daniel Penny
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump huddled with allies and a Republican cause célèbre at Saturday's Army-Navy football game, taking in one of the most storied rivalries in college sports while spotlighting his emerging national security team.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, TARA COPP and AAMER MADHANI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Blackhawks take on the Devils after Bertuzzi's 2-goal showing
item.description: Chicago Blackhawks (9-18-2, in the Central Division) vs. New Jersey Devils (19-10-3, in the Metropolitan Division) Newark, New Jersey; Saturday, 1 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Dosunmu and Giddey lead the Bulls past the struggling Hornets 109-95
item.description: Josh Giddey had 17 points, nine rebounds and seven assists, and the Chicago Bulls beat the struggling Charlotte Hornets 109-95 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 49ers player refused to enter game when called on, Shanahan says
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (KRON) -- San Francisco 49ers linebacker De'Vondre Campbell refused to enter the game when Kyle Shanahan attempted to put him in on Thursday night, Shanahan said. Campbell instead went to the locker room. The incident happened in the third quarter.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: 1 school board gives necessary approval on Arlington Park property tax deal with Bears; 2 more to go
item.description: PALATINE, Ill. — The Bears have moved one step closer to a property tax agreement on the 326-acre site of the former Arlington International Racecourse in northwest suburban Arlington Heights.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: The fate of Tropicana Field's repairs lies in the hands of St. Pete City Council
item.description: The St. Pete City Council will vote on Thursday afternoon to begin the process of repairing Tropicana Field or not.
item.dc:creator: Alessandra Young, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Reports: White Sox sign former Cub Mike Tauchman
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Free agent outfielder Mike Tauchman is trading the North Side for the South Side, according to multiple reports. MLB.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
